description_long: This object is a modern, floor-mounted toilet with a rectangular cistern and a smoothly contoured bowl. The cistern is positioned directly above the bowl and features a visible flush button on the top surface. The bowl has a wide, open rim and a deep basin, with a sturdy base that flares outward for stability. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements. The toilet appears to be made primarily of ceramic, with a uniform light gray finish. There is no visible toilet seat or additional attachments, and the flush mechanism is integrated into the top of the cistern.
description: A modern, floor-mounted toilet with a rectangular cistern, integrated flush button, and a smooth, open bowl in light gray ceramic.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rectangular cistern, flush button on top, and the full profile of the bowl and base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open bowl, wide rim, and the flat face of the cistern above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the cistern, flush button, and bowl profile visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the cistern and the base, with no bowl opening visible.
